## Legal safety dimension

Does this bug touch any of the following? Check all that apply.

- [ ] Legal safety (draft-only framing, attorney review)
- [ ] Citation discipline (invented or unverifiable authority, citations, or quotations)
- [ ] Confidentiality or privilege
- [ ] Output formatting / structure
